reason: RWKV7 wind CUDA kernel failed to assemble on GPU1 A100/CUDA 12.6 because ptxas does not recognize the movmatrix instruction while compiling for sm_80.
decision: Do not continue trying wind on the current GPU1 image. Switch to the official BlinkDL/RWKV-CUDA state-passing clampw kernel, which preserves s0 to sT and ds0 while avoiding movmatrix.
